summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 3 warning, 7 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `.team/features/extension-system/tasks/task-22/` — Missing handshake.json and artifacts. Commit `9311ed4` message claims "Circuit breaker has a passing unit test" but only contains task-21 eval files. Builder should backfill the handshake.

🟡 `.team/features/extension-system/tasks/task-21/handshake.json:7` — Handshake summary says "Timeout enforcement" but progress.md task 21 is "Circuit breaker has a passing unit test." The handshake describes the wrong task. The actual circuit breaker was implemented in commit `d5163c3` (task-6). Traceability gap — file as process improvement.

🟡 `test/extension-system.test.mjs:618` — `runExecuteRun` success path (`extensions.mjs:224`) resets `consecutiveFailures` but no test covers it; only the `callHook` reset path is tested. Add a test starting at `consecutiveFailures: 2` with a successful `runExecuteRun` call.
